input.command: gh pr view 36 --json reviewRequests,reviews,comments --jq '.reviews[] | select(.state != "COMMENTED") | {author: .author.login, state: .state, body: .body}'

gh api repos/$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner)/pulls/36/comments --paginate 2>/dev/null; gh api repos/$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner)/pulls/36/reviews --paginate -q '.[] | {author: .user.login, state: .state, body: .body}'

content.text:
There are no actionable review comments on PR #36. The only review is from the Gemini bot, which explicitly states "I have no feedback to provide." There are no issue comments, no requested changes, and no inline code review comments to address.

The PR is clean from a review perspective — nothing to fix.
